CHAPTER 1

Once upon a time, in a small village nestled at the foot of the mountains, there lived a young woman named Elena. She spent her days tending to the family garden and her nights reading by candlelight.

The villagers thought her peculiar. She didn't seem to mind.

CHAPTER 2

A few weeks later, the autumn winds began to turn cold. Elena pulled her shawl tighter and made her way to the well.

She had no idea that this morning would change everything.

CHAPTER 3

By midday, the news had spread through every household in the village.

Elena gathered her things and prepared for what was to come.
